text: I was charged twice for my monthly subscription and I need this fixed ASAP.
The app crashes every single time I try to upload a receipt photo. It's been happening for a week.
Someone logged into my account from a country I've never visited. I'm scared my data is exposed.
It would be amazing if you could add a dark mode option, my eyes hurt using this at night.
This is the third time this month I've had a billing problem. I am extremely frustrated and considering cancelling my plan entirely.
How do I export all of my data as a CSV file? I can't find the option anywhere.
My data isn't syncing between my phone and laptop, changes on one don't show up on the other.
I forgot my password and the reset email never arrived, I've checked spam multiple times.
Can you refund me for last month, I cancelled before the renewal date but was still charged.
Just wanted to say the new update looks great, is there a changelog somewhere I can read?
